title: Release 0.3.12 install finalization automation
acceptanceCriteria: Safe local steps are auto-run, already-executed steps are suppressed from pending next steps, and manual Telegram handoff remains explicit.
TUI, plain text, and JSON surfaces stay consistent without duplicate or contradictory advice.
Regression coverage exists for dedupe, pair flow, infra reuse/conflict, and background launcher classification.
Proof bundle is complete and a fresh verifier pass succeeds before publish.
